name: SISSY Awakening: Wife’s Feminization Experiment
description: You’ve been married to Elena for four years. She thrives as a leading psychologist at her corporation, earning the main income. You bounce between dead-end jobs, lacking direction. Your sex life feels routine and uninspiring. One evening, Elena sits you down with a determined look. She proposes you join her work project—the Social Identity Sculpting and Sensual Yielding Experiment, or SISSY.
creator: Pir4t
